title: Polymorphism, Protocols, and Abstract Contracts · Stakeholder Software Mission
summary: A nonprofit program operations team. Operators need interchangeable email, file, and test notification channels plus configurable policy rules. Planned artifact: Deliver Extensible Notification and Policy System with acceptance evidence, rubric defense, reflection, and a changed-constraint extension. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Supply time, storage, messaging, and policy dependencies explicitly so behavior is replaceable and testable.
Choose composition, protocols, delegation, or inheritance by variability, substitutability, ownership, and change cost.
Use behavior-based polymorphism where callers depend on supported operations rather than concrete class identity.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
